fields.description:
Discover the Samsung Galaxy A56 5G, designed for high-speed 5G connectivity, a large display, and powerful performance. Equipped with a long-lasting battery and an advanced camera system, it ensures an exceptional user experience for everyday tasks and entertainment. Galaxy A56 5G provides a robust set of features, making it a compelling choice for users seeking a balance between performance and affordability.

FEATURES:
- 5G Connectivity for Seamless Streaming: With 5G technology, the Samsung Galaxy A56 5G ensures faster internet speeds, allowing you to stream, download, and browse without interruptions.

- Immersive Display: The smartphone boasts a large, vibrant display that enhances your visual experience, whether you’re watching videos, playing games, or browsing the web.

- Camera Spec: Get excellent photos and videos with the upgraded 50MP camera on Galaxy A56 5G. It identifies the sky, skin, face, hair and grass and enhances the image quality for you instantly.

- Powerful AP: Experience the powerful performance of the upgraded Octa-core processor. Plus, with a boosted cooling system and storage up to 128GB, you can multitask, stream and play games more seamlessly than ever.

- Long battery life: With a long-lasting 5000mAh (typical) battery, you can enjoy movie marathons for up to 29 hours without having to charge your Galaxy A56 5G.

- Durability: The solid metal frame and Corning® Gorilla® Glass Victus®+ keep the Awesome design of Galaxy A56 5G looking great. Plus, with IP67 protection, the new Galaxy A series is safe from dirt and splashes.

- OS & SMR Update: Galaxy A56 5G supports up to 6 generations of OS upgrades and up to 6 years of security updates to keep it running as good as new.

fields.product_name: Hisense 55" Inch 4K UHD SMART BLUETOOTH TV-2024 MODEL+FREE 360 WALL BRACKET
fields.description:
Hisense 55" 4K SMART TV

FEATURES:
- 4K Direct Lit LED - Our direct lit full array TV's benefit from having a grid of tightly packed individual LED's positioned directly behind the screen covering the whole of the panel, leaving you able to enjoy crisp, vivid colours and deep blacks from edge to edge.

- Quad Core 4K Processor - The Hisense quad core processor with AI technology automatically delivers frame by frame AI Processing optimising the picture for brilliant viewing as well as upscaling content to a 4k quality image.

- Precision Colour technology utilises the power of quad core processing to maximise colour reproduction ensuring you get the most accurate and life-like colours, no matter the content.
Freely - Good bye aerial, this amazing new platform allows you to easily browse and watch live TV channels, together with on demand content in one seamless and intuitive interface all streamed direct to your TV via the internet.

- Smooth Motion - Dealing with motion is one of the biggest challenges TV's have, Smooth Motion, powered by the AI processor means the TV is able to identify fast-moving objects and digitally reconstructs the individual pixels to deliver fluid smooth motion.

See every detail in stunning 4K HDR with the Hisense A6N Series. 4K Ultra HD offers 4x more pixels than Full HD whilst HDR makes blacks darker, whites brighter and enhances contrast. DTS Virtual: X™ automatically separates out dialogue from background noise for a clearer, multi-dimensional audio experience. AI Picture Optimization technology instantly capture every frame of the picture and any video input signal, then automatically identifies and optimizes the image quality settings to make the viewing experience as vivid and engaging as possible. For the Gamer we have Auto Low Latency Mode (ALLM) which ensures smooth, lag-free and uninterrupted viewing and interaction. Hisense’s VIDAA Smart TV OS lets you control your TV using voice with Alexa & Google Assistant built-in as well as enjoy all your favourite entertainment from Netflix, Disney, Prime Video, and the exciting new platform Freely - The new way to watch TV. Stream live broadcast TV over an internet connection, freeing you from aerial connections forever.
Dolby Vision - Inspired by cinema technology our complete HDR solution featuring amongst others 4K HDR Immersive & Dolby Vision™ , ensuring you get astonishing brightness, brighter colours, deep contrast and more vivid, life like images.

fields.product_name: HP Brand New All in One 24-CB1024nh Core i5(1235U) 8GB RAM 512GB SSD 23.8Inch Touch Display
fields.description:
FEATURES:
- Powerful Performance in a Compact Design
Hp 24-CB1024nh Core i5 All-in-One PC combines power and elegance, featuring a 12th generation Intel Core i5 processor for smooth multitasking and productivity. This space-saving solution is perfect for home offices and compact workspaces.

- Immersive Touchscreen Experience
Interact intuitively with your content on the 23.8-inch Full HD touchscreen display. The responsive touch interface enhances productivity and provides a more engaging user experience for both work and entertainment.

- Ample Storage and Memory
With 8GB of RAM and a fast 512GB SSD, you’ll have plenty of space and speed for your applications and files. The SSD ensures quick boot times and rapid access to your frequently used programs.

- All-in-One Convenience
Eliminate cable clutter and save desk space with this integrated design. Hp 24-CB1024nh Core i5 all-in-one form factor combines the PC and display into a single, sleek unit, perfect for minimalist setups.

- Built-in Webcam and Audio
Stay connected with colleagues and loved ones using the built-in HD webcam and dual-array digital microphones. The integrated stereo speakers provide clear audio for video calls and media consumption.

- Windows 11 Ready
Experience the latest features and security updates with Windows 11, offering a fresh and intuitive interface for enhanced productivity and creativity.
